page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 32 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and is bundled with 3839 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core operations. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression rated as poor. Conversely, multi-core performance is average, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core scores. Memory bandwidth tests show average read and write speeds for large blocks, though the Passmark memory score is weak.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and substantial local SSD capacity, this server offers a high-density local storage profile. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring large local data footprints without demanding top-tier single-thread CPU speeds. Appropriate workloads include database operations, Redis deployments, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage. It operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU and memory scores are weak, falling in the bottom 25%, while multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and static web serving throughput consistently rank in the average tier. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-capacity local storage, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy workloads that do not require high single-threaded compute power. It is suitable for database hosting, Redis key-value stores, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB local SSD storage, offering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB local SSD storage for database and storage workloads.
tagline: A dedicated x86 server combining balanced compute and memory with high-capacity local SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs with 128.0 GB of system memory
3839 GB of bundled local SSD storage for high-capacity data needs
Average multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance
Weak single-core performance and memory latency scores
Suited for database operations, Redis, and static web serving
